mapper.select: { CALL ${schema}..USP_SO_CNSL_STATUS_ALRMTALK_SEND_SAVE ( #{tblSoMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userid ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message_type ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{talkReserveDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{msg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smsLmsTit ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmplMsgCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL ${schema}..USP_ALRM_SCDL_EXEC_SAVE ( #{tblSoMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userid ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message_type ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{talkReserveDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{msg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smsLmsTit ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmplMsgCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
